name: Template: Flux Klein / High-Fidelity Realism
prompt: A high-fidelity hyper-realistic photographic style of {prompt}. Shot on high-end medium format digital sensor, sharp focus, micro-contrast, natural material textures, visible fine structures, textile fibers, subtle subsurface scattering, hyper-detailed environment, neutral color grade, 8k resolution, authentic lighting, pristine optical clarity, deep spatial depth
negative_prompt: cgi, render, 3d, plastic surfaces, airbrushed, cartoon, anime, illustration, fake, over-sharpened, saturated

name: Template: LTX Video / Motion Still
prompt: Cinematic 24fps motion still of {prompt}, portraying a character with dialogue. Camera movement: dynamic slow tracking shot, 180-degree shutter angle, subtle motion blur, consistent lighting across frames, volumetric atmosphere, high dynamic range, filmic texture, LTX-optimized temporal consistency, deep shadows, 35mm sensor noise profile
negative_prompt: stuttering, jitter, static, frozen, low frame rate, morphing, glitch, flashing, amateur video

name: Template: Character sheet
prompt: A professional, high-fidelity reference sheet of {prompt}. Layout & Aesthetic: Premium production bible design. Clean, minimalist white background with thin, elegant black grid lines for scale and alignment. Editorial-style typography labeling each view clearly. The overall composition is highly organized, balanced, and uncluttered. Views & Composition: - Top Row (Orthographic Views): A complete set of multi-angle views of the subject, perfectly aligned horizontally. 1. FRONT: A clear, unobstructed front view. 2. SIDE: A profile view showing the subject from the side. 3. BACK: A full back view. - Middle Section (Action Shot): A large 3/4 hero shot depicting the subject in a dynamic pose, moment, or functional state, conveying personality and utility in their world. - Bottom Left (Details Gallery): Three clearly distinct and visually unambiguous circular close-up shots showing three different states, expressions, or visual angles. - Bottom Right (Technical Callouts): Four distinct, isolated macro detail shots of specific technical, surface, or functional elements. Style & Quality: Realistic render style with high-detail textures, material physics, and clean studio lighting with soft shadows. Sharp focus, high-resolution, professional design sheet, editorial photography aesthetic
negative_prompt: messy layout, overlapping frames, dark background, complex scenery, photorealistic environmental clutter

name: Template: Storyboard
prompt: A professional, high-fidelity film storyboard sequence depicting {prompt}. Layout & Aesthetic: Premium director's storyboard layout. Clean, minimalist dark grey background with thin, elegant white grid lines dividing the canvas into a structured grid of six identical 16:9 widescreen panels. Beneath each panel is a thin black text box with professional editorial-style typography labeling the Scene, Shot, Action, and Dialogue. Composition & Sequence: Six sequential frames arranged in a 2x3 grid, showing clear temporal progression from top-left to bottom-right. Panel 1: Establishing shot setting the scene. Panel 2: Medium tracking shot introducing the subject in detail. Panel 3: Close-up highlighting a key visual detail or kinetic action. Panel 4: Low-angle dynamic perspective shifting the spatial tension. Panel 5: High-angle wide view showing the dramatic interaction or consequence. Panel 6: Extreme close-up or cinematic resolution frame closing the sequence. Style & Quality: High-contrast sketch style with professional grey washes. Sharp, dark outlines with visible technical camera indicators. High-fidelity paper grain texture, cinematic lighting, minimalist pre-production aesthetic
negative_prompt: color, photo, hyper-realistic, messy sketches, unstructured panels, chaotic borders
